purpose: Three-pool skill design notes for the PubTables-style OCR word-box benchmark.
design_notes: The task is modeled as table reconstruction, metric extraction/audit, and grounded summary reporting.
skill_pools.json is the single source of truth for condition generation.
task_spec.json owns the prompt and required artifact contract.
data/gold contains oracle artifacts and verifier rules so target answers are not hardcoded in task.py.

leakage_policy.rule: Custom skills must not contain fixture-specific entity names, dataset names, numeric target values, expected row counts, oracle artifacts, verifier identifiers, or target output contents.
